site.title: Discover Taiwan - 探索臺灣
site.description: 探索臺灣 is dedicated to showcasing the breathtaking tourist attractions of Taiwan. Join us in exploring the rich culture, stunning landscapes, and unique experiences that our island has to offer. Together, let's promote sustainable tourism and support local communities.

hero.title: Discover Taiwan
hero.content: 探索臺灣 is dedicated to showcasing the breathtaking tourist attractions of Taiwan. Join us in exploring the rich culture, stunning landscapes, and unique experiences that our island has to offer. Together, let's promote sustainable tourism and support local communities.

gallery.title: Jingzaijiao Tile-paved Salt Fields (井仔腳瓦盤鹽田)
Tamsui Fisherman's Wharf (淡水漁人碼頭)
Tainan Art Museum Building 2 (台南市美術館2館)
Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village - Tsou (九族文化村 - 鄒族)
Zhengbin Fishing Harbor Colorful House (正濱漁港色彩屋)
Dried Persimmons in Hsinchu (新竹柿餅)
Tea plantations in Alishan Township (阿里山鄉的茶園)
Mt. Bagua Buddha Scenic Area (八卦山大佛風景區)

scheduling.title: If you are a temporary transit passenger
scheduling.subtitle: Make the most of your time and book your half-day tour now!

Links.title: TAIWAN–Waves of Wonder
Links.desc: Tourism Administration, Republic of China (Taiwan) - Taiwan Tourism Administration's official information website.

Links.title: Taiwanstay
Links.desc: A legal hostel booking service launched by the Tourism Administration, MOTC.

Links.title: Taiwan Tourist Shuttle
Links.desc: A bus service designed by the Tourism Administration specifically for tourism planning and attraction shuttling.

Links.title: Taiwan Tour Bus
Links.desc: Tour products launched by the Tourism Administration, MOTC and travel agencies to explore Taiwan easily.

Links.title: Taiwan Pass
Links.desc: An electronic ticket card recommending unique local attractions and providing convenient public transportation access.

Links.title: YouBike
Links.desc: A public bicycle rental system built and operated by Taiwan bicycle manufacturer Giant.

Links.title: Travel in Taiwan
Links.desc: The official English bimonthly magazine of the Taiwan Tourism Bureau with useful info about traveling in Taiwan.

Links.title: Taiwan Cultural Landscape
Links.desc: Carefully selected tourist attractions with Taiwan's cultural heritage to understand its multicultural landscape.

Links.title: Taiwan Bike - Web Portal
Links.desc: Provides integrated information on Taiwan’s bicycle-friendly environment, including routes, attractions, services, transport, real-time weather, and route planning for low-carbon travel.

Links.title: Taiwan Forest Recreation
Links.desc: An official integrated portal by the Forestry and Nature Conservation Agency, providing information on Taiwan’s 19 National Forest Recreation Areas, forest parks, nature centers, and the national trail system.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Please send us your thoughts, suggestions, and questions so we can improve.
